quotes: Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall. New icons are permitted but **must match this stylistic approach** (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work).
Icon colors and backgrounds adjustable **only within the brand palette**.
Consider scale and contrast for low-vision audiences. [GENERAL: minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds.]

rules.intent: Ensure visual consistency of icons and guarantee legibility/accessibility for low-vision users.
rules.rule_text: Iconography must use a minimal line illustration style with consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, and single-color line work. Icon colors and backgrounds must remain strictly within the brand palette (with default Brand Blue strokes, color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b, on light backgrounds). To support low-vision audiences, icons in email must maintain a minimum render size of 32x32px (size.icon_min_render = 32px).
